global.description: The ad features a vibrant orange background with bold text and graphic elements.
global.main_message: Promoting a music streaming service with new hits.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: Central graphic element
elements.description: A large circular shape centered in the ad, possibly representing a visual or decorative element.

elements.label: Secondary graphic element
elements.description: A rectangular shape centered below the main graphic, likely serving as a background or decorative feature.

elements.label: Overlay graphic element
elements.description: A smaller circular shape overlapping with the central graphic, adding depth to the design.

elements.label: Background shape
elements.description: A large rectangular shape that serves as the main background for the ad, providing a solid color base.

elements.label: Small circular element
elements.description: A tiny circular shape positioned towards the bottom, likely a decorative or accent element.

elements.label: Main message text
elements.description: Bold text stating 'Stream the hype New hits every week', prominently displayed in the center of the ad.
elements.text_content: Stream the hype New hits every week

elements.label: Brand logo
elements.description: The word 'PulsePlay' in a bold font, positioned at the top of the ad, representing the brand identity.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: The phrase 'Learn more' in a clear, inviting font at the bottom of the ad, encouraging user interaction.

elements.label: User-generated content tag
elements.description: The abbreviation 'UGC' in a small font at the top left, indicating user-generated content.
